ground_truth.title: Broad Ripple Pricing - The Yoga Studio
ground_truth.main_content:
New Member Intro Offers

2 weeks unlimited
This package is for NEW STUDENTS only. One/person. All unlimited memberships will automatically reset the start date with your first visit. All purchases are non-refundable. Expires 14 days from the date of first redemption.

$35

Membership Options

***All memberships can be used at both locations***

Auto-Renewal Month Unlimited
3 month commitment
I hereby authorize The Yoga Studio, LLC to debit my credit card $130/month. I understand that I am entering an agreement for a minimum period of three months. My membership will be month-to-month thereafter, until I notify The Yoga Studio, LLC at least 7 days in advance of when I wish to cancel. For use at BOTH the Broad Ripple Studio and Carmel locations.
Additional benefits – 10% off products and workshops + one complimentary guest pass per month. Some exclusions may apply.
Any transaction returned for non-payment will be assessed a $15 returned item fee.

$130

one month unlimited
30 day expiration

$155

one month unlimited – 25 and under
30 day expiration
Promo Code: MONTH105

$105

Class Packs

***All class packs can be used at both locations***

Single Class
Please continue to book class after walk-in is purchased. Purchasing walk-in alone does not register you for a chosen class.

$25

5 Pack
Package expires 3 months from purchase.
Also available to buy as a gift card
Gift card expires 3 months from redemption.
No limit to the amount purchased.

$60

10 Pack
3 month expiration from the date of purchase.
Can be used at both studio locations

$160

25 Pack
6 month expiration

$350

50 Pack
1 year expiration

$600

1 Workshop
Purchasing this package does not register you for the workshop, please continue to book after workshop package has been purchased.

$35

Discounts Available

***Discounts may not be used on intro offers or combined with any other promotions.***

STUDENT DISCOUNT
$12 Walk-In
Ages 16 – 22
Parent Consent for ages 16-17
Promo Code: Student12

Senior Discount
$12 Walk-In
65 years and older
Promo Code: Senior12

MILITARY Discount
$12 Walk-In
Promo Code: Miltary12

EXPRESS WALK IN
Express Walk-in for $12.
Expires 30 days from purchase
Only for 45-minute express classes.

OFF-PEAK WALK IN
Off Peak Walk-In for $12
Expires 30 days from the date of purchase
11:30 am and 4:30 pm classes Mon – Fri ONLY.
Does NOT include 4 pm Friday class at Broad Ripple or ANY weekend class time.

All single class and package purchases are non-refundable and there are no extensions on packages after the expiration date.
*Exceptions made only for Medical Reasons.
